arts.ttl: “I am not running away”: De Zerbi stands firm ahead of Marseille’s clash with Lens
arts.sum: Roberto De Zerbi held a fiery press conference ahead of Olympique de Marseille’s upcoming match against RC Lens, firmly addressing speculation about his future with the club. Following a disappointing loss to Auxerre, De Zerbi had previously stated, “If the problem is me, I am ready to leave my salary here and go.” In the latest conference, he emphasized the importance of daily performance, saying, “The moment of truth for me is every day, not just the matches but also the training sessions. Tomorrow is a match worth three points, not twelve. We know what we need to do to The post “I am not running away”: De Zerbi stands firm ahead of Marseille’s clash with Lens appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.sum: Marseille coach Roberto De Zerbi says he won’t leave the club despite hinting before the international break that he might do so. “I’m not going to run away because of what happened.

Following a demoralising loss at home to Auxerre before the international break, it's imperative that Roberto De Zerbi's side get back on track to keep up their push for a top three finish by the end ...

arts.ttl: Paul Pogba is encouraged to sign for Marseille by forgotten World Cup winner - as he brands transfer periods 's***' amid uncertainty over the former Man United man's future
arts.sum: Pogba was originally suspended on September 11, 2023, by Italy's national anti-doping tribunal (NADO) for increased levels of testosterone, following a random drug test.
